title: EDEN wire — claim request
description: Request body for POST /v0/experiments/{E}/tasks/{T}/claim. See 07-wire-protocol.md §2.3 and 04-task-protocol.md §3.

worker_id.description: Identifier the worker supplies at claim time (04-task-protocol.md §3.2).

expires_at.description: Optional claim expiry; if present the server MAY reclaim after this time (04-task-protocol.md §3.2, §5.1).
